name: Hewlett Packard Enterprise / 慧与
sector: Enterprise infrastructure / 企业基础设施
summary: HPE 提供服务器、网络、存储和混合云基础设施，并与 NVIDIA 平台共同服务企业 AI/HPC 场景。 / HPE provides servers, networking, storage, and hybrid-cloud infrastructure, and works with NVIDIA platforms in enterprise AI and HPC scenarios.
summaryZh: HPE 提供服务器、网络、存储和混合云基础设施，并与 NVIDIA 平台共同服务企业 AI/HPC 场景。
summaryEn: HPE provides servers, networking, storage, and hybrid-cloud infrastructure, and works with NVIDIA platforms in enterprise AI and HPC scenarios.

business.description: 公司向企业和公共部门客户提供计算、网络、存储、混合云和边缘基础设施。 / The company provides compute, networking, storage, hybrid-cloud, and edge infrastructure to enterprise and public-sector customers.
business.descriptionZh: 公司向企业和公共部门客户提供计算、网络、存储、混合云和边缘基础设施。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides compute, networking, storage, hybrid-cloud, and edge infrastructure to enterprise and public-sector customers.
revenueModel: 智能边缘与网络 / intelligent edge and networking

business.thesis: NVIDIA 相关性来自 AI/HPC 服务器、企业 AI 系统和加速计算集成，需求由企业与主权 AI 项目驱动。 / The NVIDIA linkage comes from AI/HPC servers, enterprise AI systems, and accelerated-computing integration, driven by enterprise and sovereign AI projects.
business.thesisZh: NVIDIA 相关性来自 AI/HPC 服务器、企业 AI 系统和加速计算集成，需求由企业与主权 AI 项目驱动。
business.thesisEn: The NVIDIA linkage comes from AI/HPC servers, enterprise AI systems, and accelerated-computing integration, driven by enterprise and sovereign AI projects.
riskNotes: 企业 IT 项目周期和大型 AI 集群交付节奏会影响收入确认。 / Enterprise IT cycles and large AI-cluster delivery timing affect revenue recognition.
并购整合和产品组合变化可能影响利润率。 / Integration and mix changes can affect margins.
